raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the left side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; a gentle lateral contact point on box_2 is available to prevent it from lifting or sliding while separating attached boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing motion during the lift of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is accessible from both sides; enough clearance exists on the left and right sides for both end-effectors to establish opposing lateral contacts; box_2 is stabilized to counter adhesion/attachment forces between box_1 and box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors with a bilateral pinch grasp and is ready to be lifted free of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is already held laterally; the upward lift path above box_1 is free of obstacles and provides sufficient clearance to separate box_1 from box_2 despite the 'attached_to' relationship.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted upward and separated from box_2, no longer on_top_of or attached_to box_2."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the left side of box_2 without colliding with box_1; a gentle lateral contact point on box_2 is available to prevent it from lifting or sliding while separating attached boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is laterally constrained by the left end-effector, reducing motion during the lift of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is accessible from both sides; enough clearance exists on the left and right sides for both end-effectors to establish opposing lateral contacts; box_2 is stabilized to counter adhesion/attachment forces between box_1 and box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held by both end-effectors with a bilateral pinch grasp and is ready to be lifted free of box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is already held laterally; the upward lift path above box_1 is free of obstacles and provides sufficient clearance to separate box_1 from box_2 despite the 'attached_to' relationship.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted upward and separated from box_2, no longer on_top_of or attached_to box_2.
